# Play Page Check

- Scope constrained to Sleuth namespaces only.
- Existing world APIs, script loader, and Backboard chat client were already present and usable.
- Missing phase surface confirmed: `app/scripts/[id]/play/page.tsx` and the play-page Sleuth components did not exist.
- Verification requirements locked up front: `pnpm lint`, `pnpm typecheck`, `pnpm test`, `pnpm build`.
